home.bio: I'm a fourth-year ICT student at Prince of Songkla University, currently seeking a cooperative internship opportunity in roles such as frontend developer, backend developer, full-stack developer, or in the field of machine learning. I'm eager to gain hands-on experience, learn from real-world projects, and continuously improve my skills through professional collaboration and development challenges.

about.title: About
about.name: Name
about.educationValue: Bachelor of Science in Information and Communication Technology (ICT)
about.universityValue: Prince of Songkla University, Hat Yai Campus

experience.title: Experience
experience.noExperience: No experience to display at this time.

description: Developed and integrated full-stack web applications for a booth reservation system using HTML, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript, and Node.js.
Managed PostgreSQL databases and created Software Requirements Specification (SRS) documents to guide project development.
Gained practical experience with deployment platforms (Railway, Render) and database management tools (pgAdmin).
Enhanced presentation and progress reporting skills through regular project updates.

items.company: Prince of Songkla University — Faculty of ICT
description: Collaborated with the university's internal development team on web-based academic management tools.
Contributed to frontend development using React and assisted in API integration with backend services.
Participated in Agile sprints, code reviews, and documentation processes.

items.title: Tomato Leaf Disease Classifier (CNN) 2025
description: Designing a web app to classify tomato leaf diseases using CNN (InceptionV3 & EfficientNetB0).
Models are trained on a custom dataset of 3,000 images (3 classes) via Kaggle, with image augmentation and transfer learning.
Built with React (frontend), FastAPI (backend), and PostgreSQL.
Features include user image upload, prediction history, and admin disease management with role-based access.
items.technologies: Python, JavaScript, React.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, TensorFlow, InceptionV3, EfficientNetB0, Material UI (MUI), Git

items.title: PSU Parking 2024
description: Developed a web-based application to assist users in locating parking spots at PSU, integrating Google Maps API for real-time navigation.
Built RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.js to manage parking data in JSON format.
Designed search and filter functionalities to enhance user experience.
items.technologies: Node.js, Express.js, Google Maps API, JSON, HTML, CSS, JavaScript

items.title: AlertRadar Object Detection and Air Quality Monitoring System 2024
description: Designed and implemented an IoT-based system to detect objects and monitor air quality in real-time.
Used sensors HC-SR04, MQ-135 and ESP8266 for Wi-Fi connectivity to collect data and send alerts.
Integrated LINE API for real-time notifications and stored data on ThingSpeak for visualization and analysis.
items.technologies: C/C++, ESP8266, HC-SR04, MQ-135, LINE API, ThingSpeak

items.title: Startify 2024
description: Designed a mobile application prototype allowing users to customize cars and view detailed specifications.
Created user flows, wireframes, and prototypes using Figma.
Focused on user-centered design principles and responsive interface layouts.

items.title: QIT 2023
description: Developed a web-based system for managing and displaying products using React for the frontend.
Designed a customer interface for browsing products with search, filter, and detailed product views.
Built an admin interface to manage product inventory, including updates for stock, prices, and product descriptions.
Used Fetch API for data transfer between the frontend and backend.
items.technologies: React, JavaScript, Fetch API, HTML, CSS
